title: Medlife is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Medlife is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Medlife invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Medlife:
Medlife is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife!
